title: Zoro and Sanji Dominate
description: On pages 13–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is zoro and sanji dominate.
scene: The scene follows zoro and sanji dominate, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Owwww wwise!!! I went an' slipped up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I fell all da way down here!! Stop Da ship, okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What is the meaning of this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this a new part of the plan?!! It looks like decken's flying that thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I even used my arrangement HAK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is decken's doing?! That lunatic of a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This was not part of the plan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bahoho hohohohoh!! Waddatsum!!! Sorry, but there ain't no way to save you now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once I set something flying with my ability, it doesn't stop until it crashes smack-bang into something or eliminates the target!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you'll just have to join the rest of fish-man Island...in sacrificing your life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoshii, you say...?! don't tell me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...just like all those letters and axis... you've actually thrown this ship straight at her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no use!!! The bubble won't hold out any longer!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, where did Princess Shirahoshii go?! she's vanished!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shirahoshi!! What are you doing up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That ship is hurtling straight towards the princess....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, no... I should never have let her out of my sight !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your "Target" is my life alone, is it not?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot allow you to endanger the lives of the people of the ryuguu kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: where my... where my life alone will suffice!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is there no way to save her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhh, your beauty runs deep, my shirahosh!! Right to the heart!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you think you can bear the full force of this great calamity...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was planning to crush us along with the rest of the island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: die in the height of your beauty, Shirahoshii, that you may live on in my heart alone!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's heading straight for Princess Shirahoshi!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told her to stay close to me!!

summary: Zoro and Sanji Dominate. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
